Selected fixtures copied from the upstream JSON-Schema-Test-Suite project.

Source URLs:
- `draft7/dependencies.json`
  - https://raw.githubusercontent.com/json-schema-org/JSON-Schema-Test-Suite/main/tests/draft7/dependencies.json
- `draft7/propertyNames.json`
  - https://raw.githubusercontent.com/json-schema-org/JSON-Schema-Test-Suite/main/tests/draft7/propertyNames.json
- `draft2019-09/unevaluatedProperties-selected.json`
  - Selected cases from:
    https://raw.githubusercontent.com/json-schema-org/JSON-Schema-Test-Suite/main/tests/draft2019-09/unevaluatedProperties.json
- `draft2020-12/dependentRequired.json`
  - https://raw.githubusercontent.com/json-schema-org/JSON-Schema-Test-Suite/main/tests/draft2020-12/dependentRequired.json
- `draft2020-12/dependentSchemas.json`
  - https://raw.githubusercontent.com/json-schema-org/JSON-Schema-Test-Suite/main/tests/draft2020-12/dependentSchemas.json

The linter harness only runs object-root cases whose instance data is representable as TOML.
